In this lesson, we're going to talk about maximization offer number two, the soft add-on. You can see looking at the map where this offer falls. This offer comes immediately after the reverse add-on. Whether a customer takes the reverse add-on or not, they'll be brought to the soft add-on offer page. Let's talk about the elements now of the soft add-on offer. Of course, just like before, this also has to be congruent with the customer captivation offer. It's got to be linked. It's got to be connected in terms of topic and idea. As well, it needs to add value to the customer captivation offer. Of course, it cannot in any way again imply that the customer captivation offer is incomplete. In other words, it can't convey that unless they take this offer that they're not getting the full story. The soft add-on offer is just that. It's a soft offer. It's a pay nothing now proposition. The goal is to build trust. When this offer gets presented, it gets presented to the customer as, look, I know you haven't had the chance to go through my program yet. As a way of building trust with you, I want to give you the opportunity to pay nothing now to go through the program before you pay anything and only pay if you love it. It's a pay nothing now proposition where the customer is billed in 72 hours and only if they're ecstatic, only if they're thrilled with what it is that you've provided them with. If it's an information product, maybe it's an additional training program, whatever it may be, but it is a pay nothing now. Look at the larger picture of this. They went and they were presented with an over the top superior offer when they were presented with the customer captivation offer. It was a low barrier, high value offer that turned the prospect into a customer. They were then presented with the reverse add-on which taps into their typical experience as a consumer adding or upgrading their offer. Now we're giving them the ability to get even more value from us without paying anything right now. It's pay nothing now and then get billed in 72 hours. The soft add-on is priced between $67 and $97. Just like with the reverse add-on offer, this offer is presented as a VSL or a short form sales letter with no delay on the add to cart button. There is no delay. The add to cart button is displayed and that's because this is a low friction offer because it's a pay nothing now. It's no money now and only pay if you are thrilled. The key with making this offer work is that you are presenting it to a customer in a way where you're talking about, look, I recognize that you've yet to go through any of the training. You've yet to see that I deliver the goods. You've yet to see an experience that I know what I'm talking about and that I can help you. Because of that, I want to make you an offer where you pay nothing today and you can go through this entire training. You can go through it over the next three days and only if you love it will you be billed. You see how going from the customer captivation to the reverse add-on to the soft add-on offer, it's just an extremely low friction process, which is why the take rate, the conversion rate on the reverse add-on and the soft add-on are typically through the roof. It's not uncommon with the reverse add-on to see over 50%. In fact, we have one reverse add-on that's regularly four months now converted over 62% on a regular basis. That means 62% of the people that take the customer captivation offer take the reverse add-on. With the soft add-on offer, you'll also see upwards of 30% to 35% plus take this soft add-on if not more as long as it is congruent and it adds value and it taps into what they've already shown you they are interested in. Here's an example of a simple soft add-on offer. This is an actual offer that we have here at Marketing Funnel Automation for a four-hour training. You can see over here, this is a section from a short form sales letter which is how this offer is presented. This area comes below this area on the short form sales letter. It says, here's the deal, you get instant access to the entire four-hour boot camp recording for free. Then take three days to put everything I share with you to the test to prove it doubles your sales conversions. If you don't see at least a doubling of your sales conversions, simply send me an email to a special email address I'll give you. I first saw this from Egan Smith, so I got to give him credit for that, a special email address that I'll give you during the boot camp and you pay nothing. If you do see a doubling or more of your sales conversions, do nothing and you'll be billed just one payment of $67. It's as simple as that. Then they have the ability over here to start. This is a two-step process. They enter their name in here. This is a two-step process because what I'm showing you right here is not part of the transaction maximization sequence. In the transaction maximization sequence, this offer is presented as a one-click. As you saw in Module 5 from Brian inside, for example, of SamCart, there would be an add to cart button here where they can take advantage of the offer and then there would be a no thanks, I'll pass on this offer link right here. That's how that page would be set up. That is maximization offer number two, the soft add-on.
